landing.aboutDesc2: Share the link on WhatsApp, family keeps growing. A platform where your entire family connects in one tree.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for Indian families, with Indian relations
landing.feature1Desc: Grandparents, aunts, uncles, in-laws, nephews, nieces — every relation covered. No Western app does this.
landing.feature2Desc: Gotra, Kul Devi, Jati, Nakshatra, Rashi — complete Hindu identity in one place
landing.feature3Desc: Daughter got married? Both family trees connect automatically — cross-tree marriage links
landing.feature4Desc: Father, grandfather, great-grandfather — 3 generations' tithi and teerth sthal in one click
landing.feature5Desc: Your data is yours alone. Visible only according to gotra — no public exposure
landing.featurePills: WhatsApp Share,Bilingual Hindi/English,Offline Ready (PWA),Elder-Friendly,Multiple Marriages,Recycle Bin,Soft Delete,7 Generations,Gotra Discovery
landing.step1Detail: Enter your email, get a magic link. Click it — done!
landing.step2Detail: Start with grandparents, add members one by one. Fill in gotra, kul devi, everything.
landing.step3Detail: Share the link, family sees it and keeps joining. Tree keeps growing!
landing.insideSubtitle: No surprises — here's exactly what data we collect and how your tree looks
landing.insideProfileNote: Only gotra, village, and district are required. Everything else is optional.
landing.insideMemberNote: Color-coded by gender. Deceased shown in grey with 🕊. Maiden name always preserved.
landing.insideMarriageNote: Maiden name is NEVER deleted. The woman (or tree owner) chooses how to display. Both family trees can connect.
landing.insidePrivLevel1Desc: Can see everything — full member data, relations, details
landing.insidePrivLevel2Desc: Can only see: surname, village, kul devi (via gotra discovery)
landing.insidePrivLevel3Desc: Can see nothing personal. Only public tree metadata if shared via link.
landing.demoSubtitle: Interactive example — tap cards to expand details
landing.demoFooter: This is a demo. Your tree can be even bigger!
landing.before5: Generational knowledge stays only with elders
landing.before6: New generation doesn't know Kul Devi or Gotra
landing.after1: Complete record of 7 generations — digital, always safe
landing.after2: Shraddh helper — tithi, teerth sthal in one click
landing.after5: Entire family can connect via WhatsApp
landing.after6: Gotra, Kul Devi, Nakshatra — all recorded
landing.sevaDesc: This is not a business. This is seva. No ads, no premium, no data selling. Just connecting families.
landing.faq1A: Yes, 100% free. No hidden charges, no premium plans, no ads. This is seva, not a business.
landing.faq2A: Only your family members. Gotra-based privacy — outsiders can only see tree metadata (surname, village), no personal information.
landing.faq3A: Children or grandchildren can add grandparents' data. Elders don't need to create their own account.
landing.faq4Q: What if my tree already exists?
landing.faq4A: Search first! Search by name, gotra, village. If found, just Join — no duplicates will be created.
landing.faq5Q: Will maiden name be lost after marriage?
landing.faq5A: Never! Maiden name (née tag) is always preserved. Married women can choose their display name.
landing.faq6A: PWA (Progressive Web App) — works offline after first load. Add to Home Screen!
landing.ctaSmall: No signup needed to search. Create your tree in 5 minutes.
landing.footerBuilt: Built with love as Seva by UnfoldCRO

guide.title: How to Create Your Family Tree
guide.subtitle: A step-by-step guide to building your Vansh Vriksh
guide.step1Desc: Enter your email and click the magic link we send you. That's it — no password needed!
guide.step1Tips: Tip: Use an email you check regularly. The magic link expires in 1 hour.
guide.step2Desc: Fill in your name, gotra, kul devi, village, and district. This becomes the root of your family tree.
guide.step2Tips: Tip: If you don't know your gotra or kul devi, ask your elders! You can also add it later.
guide.step3Desc: Start with your parents and grandparents. Then add siblings, spouse, children. Choose from 38+ Indian relations.
guide.step3Tips: Tip: Start with the oldest generation you know. Children/grandchildren can add elders' data.
guide.step4Desc: See your family beautifully organized by generation. Tap any member to see full details.
guide.step4Tips: Tip: Use Shraddh View to quickly see 3 paternal generations with death tithi and teerth sthal.
guide.step5Desc: Share your tree link on WhatsApp. Family members can join and add their own branches.
guide.step5Tips: Tip: When someone joins, you approve them. They become a branch editor and can add their spouse and children.
guide.tryDemoDesc: Explore all features with sample data. Nothing is saved — experiment freely!
guide.readyText: Ready to create your own tree?
guide.onboardTitle: New here? See how it works!
guide.onboardDesc: Learn how to create your family tree step by step.
